# PERF-90 positive: c.Set in middleware stores a large value
lang: go
file: PERF-090-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"github.com/labstack/echo/v4"
)

func BigCacheMiddleware(next echo.HandlerFunc) echo.HandlerFunc {
	return func(c echo.Context) error {
		big := make([]byte, 1<<20)
		for i := range big {
			big[i] = byte(i)
		}
		c.Set("big", big)
		return next(c)
	}
}
